<!--
Thanks for the contribution. Before submitting:
  1. Every commit must include a Signed-off-by trailer (DCO). Use `git commit -s`.
  2. `make all` should pass locally.
-->

## What changed

<!-- One paragraph. What and why — not how. -->

## Linked design decisions / docs

<!-- Cite the DD-XXX from SoyaOS Design Decisions, or the relevant design doc. -->
<!-- Example: Implements DD-005 (OpenAI-Compat Gateway). -->

## Testing notes

<!-- Commands you ran, edge cases you considered. If a test isn't possible, say why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are `Signed-off-by` (DCO)
- [ ] `make vet test build` passes
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased section)
- [ ] Docs / READMEs updated when behavior changes
